intent: 1BR / 1 bath wide side-split smoke test, no carport. 10x8 lot with standard 2 m setbacks gives a 6x4 m envelope (24 m2, ratio 1.5): full-depth bedroom column, rear service band with bath and kitchen side-by-side (bath between bedroom and kitchen as an acoustic buffer), great room in front with the entry and counter dining on the horizontal kitchen seam.
must_haves: bath and kitchen side-by-side in a rear band on one plumbing wall
great room in front of the service band with counter dining
